name: Rogz Dog Utility Control Collar Web X-Large - Red
shortDescription: Rogz Utility control collar Web – X-Large Red
description: Rogz Control Collar Web is a safe, non-slip collar recommended for behavior correction and training. Through gently applied pressure, when attached to a Lead/Leash, the two D-rings are drawn together, tightening slightly to prevent your dog from reversing out of the collar. TO FIT: To avoid injury, fit the collar with a two-finger gap between the metal rings in the tightened position. The collar should then fit snuggly over your dog's head. Size: X-Large 25mm (Neck Size: 45 - 60cm)

images.alt: Rogz Dog Utility Control Collar Web X-Large – Red
